---
name: Feature / Missing Documentation Request
about: Suggest an addition to the skills documentation or MCP spec.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. I need to understand how the Master/Slave file structure works for Option A).

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A description of what you want to see added to the markdown skills docs.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
